emails.subject: e prime guarantees
emails.body: e prime guarantees Frank, Attached are the two guarantees for e prime and e prime Energy Marketing, Inc. (You wanted me to email them to you and you were going to review and send on to Credit) Stephanie

emails.subject: e prime guarantees
emails.body: Frank, See attached with changes to the two e prime guarantees.

emails.subject: RE: e prime guarantees
emails.body: Frank, It appears from Veronica's message below that e prime Energy Marketing will be doing physical transactions with both ENA and ECC.

emails.subject: RE: e prime guarantees
emails.body: Ok! Accept the changes and let's get the documents to Charlie Otto and Lucy Ortiz since we haven't heard anymore from Jay/Veronica.
